name: Qwen3.6
metaDescription: Qwen3.6 (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2026-04 — part of the Qwen (open-weight) line. Open-weight (Apache 2.0) generation; Qwen3.6-35B-A3B (35B total / 3B active M…
overview: Qwen3.6 is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen (open-weight) line. Released 2026-04. The flagship open-weight (Apache 2.0) family spanning edge-sized dense models to large MoE models, covering general text, reasoning and agentic use.

What's notable in this version: Open-weight (Apache 2.0) generation; Qwen3.6-35B-A3B (35B total / 3B active MoE, agentic coding, thinking-context preservation) on 2026-04-16 and a Qwen3.6-27B dense model on 2026-04-22.
